_comment: WC2026 Group A, MD3 (simultaneous). Standings before: Mexico 6 pts (2-0 South Africa, 1-0 South Korea) ALREADY THROUGH and likely group winner; South Korea 3, Czech Republic 1 (1-2 South Korea, 1-1 South Africa), South Africa 1. Mexico qualified -> ROTATION / lower urgency likely; Czech must win (and need favours) to chase 3rd. This compresses the gap: Mexico still favourite but with a qualified-team discount. Cards not modelled (referee TBD).

meta.stakes: Mexico already qualified (6 pts) and may rotate; Czech Republic (1 pt) must win to keep slim third-place hopes alive.

home.name: Mexico
notes: Strong host, won both (3-0 aggregate, clean sheets). attack 1.22.

notes: Decent European side; lost narrowly to South Korea, drew South Africa. attack 1.0.
